content: When a refine/inventory ticket asks to compare N surfaces against a new analytical lens (role-card shape, loop-moves, anatomy gaps), scope the lens to the surfaces where it carries semantic meaning (e.g. actual LLM prompts) rather than running it across every deterministic-script/config row too — the latter produces mostly-null cells and quadruples the document for no signal.

Do not author full new role-card/persona content as a side effect of a size:S inventory ticket — an inventory ticket's job is to identify candidates (source prompts + one-line rationale) and defer authoring to a follow-up implementation issue, especially when the pattern being adopted (e.g. agency-agents role cards) has zero prior references in the repo.
